Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4000 "MOONCRESTA-4000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Moon Cresta.prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the LDA #$01 instruction at $4010 to be LDA #$00 instead so that $18 gets set to $00 in the following instruction. This causes the game to default to the joystick in port 2 instead of keyboard on startup. 2. Patched the LDX $DC01 instructions at $5C9D and $5FF9 (these are where the keyboard is checked on the two title screens) to be JSR $1000 instead. 3. Added a small routine at $1000 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then the settings screen is shown in the same way as if a key is pressed.
